components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button with Neumorphic depth and Orange accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #EA580C; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: 6px 6px 12px rgba(234, 88, 12, 0.3), -6px -6px 12px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 8px 8px 16px rgba(234, 88, 12, 0.4), -8px -8px 16px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: inset 4px 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }

components.name: Neumorphic Card
components.description: Standard content container with Soft UI elevation.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #F0F0F3; border-radius: 32px; padding: 32px; box-shadow: 10px 10px 20px rgba(174, 174, 192, 0.6), -10px -10px 20px #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-card h3 { color: #1A1A1A; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; } .ds-card p { color: #4A4A4A; font-size: 14px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: Musclo is a high-performance environment where the rigor of exercise science meets the physical feedback of elite equipment.
dos: Do use uppercase for all headers
Do apply shadow-neu to primary containers
